titleStmt.title: SII 27.430: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 430. (A.R. No. 567 of 1929-30.) HATTYAṄGAḌI, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 4) set up in the prākāra of Lōkanāthēśvara temple.
This registers a gift of land at Hosabeṭṭu in Guḷavāḍi village in Hār-nāḍu, by Baṅkiyarasa alias Hoṁneya-Kaṁbaḷi-voḍeya, to god Lōkanāthadēva of Haṭṭiyaṅgaḍi.
It is dated Śaka 1512, Vikṛiti, Māgha śu. 3, Monday corresponding to 1591 A.D., June 18.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śubhamastu namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya
nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī vijayobhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavaruśa 1512 saṁdu saluva vartamāna vikruti saṁvatsarada māgha śu 3 ca
ṁdravāradalū haṭṭiyaṁgaḍiya lōkanāthadēvara divyaśrīpādapadmaṁgaḷige baṁki
yarasarāda hoṁneyakaṁbaḷi voḍeyaru śāṣṭāṁga veṟagi voḍavaṭṭu koṭṭadharmma
sādhanada vakhaṇiya kramaveṁteṁdare naṁma hārṁnāḍa guḷavāḍiya maṁdinoḷage
hosabeṭṭinalli naṁma Āramaneya bada bāḷu hiriyagaddeya catussīmeya vivara mu
ḍalu tiṁmeyanāyakara saṁtānadavara gaḍiyiṁdalū saṁṇa beṁmaṇaseṭṭiyagaḍi
yiṁdalū paḍuvalu teṁkalu saṁṇabeṁmaṇa seṭiya keṟeya gadeya gaḍiyiṁda
lū tiṁmeyanāyakara saṁtānadavara Ayivattu hāne gadeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍa
galu paḍuvalu hariva bacala gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu harida bacala gaḍi
yiṁdaṁ teṁkaluyiṁtī catussīmeyiṁ doḷage hirigademu 4 nālkumuḍi ma
ttaṁ haḍuvalagadeya catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu saṁṇa sāṭiya
goṇabeyagadeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu hariva bacala gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu kōṭēśvaradēvara dēvasyada kaḷasa gadeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mū
ḍalu baḍagalu harivabacala gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī nālkugaḍiyiṁ
doḷage haḍuvala kaḷasagademu 2 . yeraḍuvare muḍiThe inscription stops abruptly here.
Digital edition of SII 27.430 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
